pages.raw_text:
The Seattle Acknowledgements sizes
MP the result of the recent Portland
rate convention in the following ar
ticle and gloats over the foreshadow-
cd action of the state railroad COM
mission, the result Of the Spokesman
Reviews shortsightedness and gen.
eral Durha,nism:


Seattle and Portland jobbers and
manufacturers are expressing them
selves as satisfied with the result OF
the recent conferences between the
North Pacific Coast Jobbers and Man
ufacturers' association and the traf-
fic officials, whose several sessions
have been chronicled in the Post
Intelligencer and who were gathered
a week ago last night in j. ID. Far
rells office and discussed the bill Gre
ating the railroad commission in this
state


1.-THE manufacturers and jobbers OF
the coast cities have looked obviously
over the line marked around Spo-
kane, granted by the Transconti-
mental Freight association, and known
as Spokane's hundred-mile limit. The
think asked of the traffic officials was
the elimination of this hundred-mile
zone, so that the coast johbers could
break back into territory that is gen.
orally regarded by business men as
tributary to coast shipping points.


"On the other hand, Spokane mer-
chants asked for the continuance of
the commercial zone and also for a
terminal rate While Spokane receiv-
ed no terminal rates. it expected none.
